name: @assistant/desktop
author: kcosr
description: Electron desktop app for AI Assistant

scripts.preelectron:dev: npm run bundle -w @assistant/web-client && npm run build:plugins && node scripts/sync-plugin-assets.mjs
scripts.preelectron:build: npm run build -w @assistant/web-client && npm run build:plugins && node scripts/sync-plugin-assets.mjs
scripts.electron:dev:work: ASSISTANT_DESKTOP_VARIANT=work ASSISTANT_DESKTOP_DEFAULT_BACKEND_URL=https://assistant/assistant-work npm run build:main && ASSISTANT_DESKTOP_VARIANT=work ASSISTANT_DESKTOP_DEFAULT_BACKEND_URL=https://assistant/assistant-work electron .
scripts.electron:build:work: ASSISTANT_DESKTOP_VARIANT=work ASSISTANT_DESKTOP_DEFAULT_BACKEND_URL=https://assistant/assistant-work npm run build:main && ASSISTANT_DESKTOP_VARIANT=work ASSISTANT_DESKTOP_DEFAULT_BACKEND_URL=https://assistant/assistant-work electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs
